metadata.description: Innovation framework for human-AI co-creation across TRL -2 through TRL 4.

plugins.name: vibe-innovation
plugins.description: Innovation framework with 9 skills (innovate, innovate-phase, innovate-status, innovate-icd, innovate-redteam, innovate-experiment, innovate-loopback, innovate-export, chaos), the Innovation Canvas Document, the TRL ladder, and the phase-orchestrator agent.
